info.title: AgentLedger Control-Plane API
info.description: Tenant-scoped control plane: resources, auth, and analytics over the MVs.

valueUsd.description: Business value of the outcome in USD (>= 0).

runId.description: The agent run that produced this outcome (the cost side of the chain).

source.description: Business source system; defaults to 'api' for manual/API-created outcomes.

occurredAt.description: ISO timestamp the outcome occurred; defaults to now.

dryRun.description: When true, validate + report what WOULD be imported without writing.
